reviews.review_title: The game looks good, but I can't play it
reviews.review_description: This was one of the first games I've played and I stopped playing for a bit. Once the game got an update I was really hyped for it, I reinstalled the game and started to play only for the game to crash. I uninstalled most games that I didn't play that much and started the game again and it still crashed.
It keeps￼ crashing each time I try to plate the game PLEASE FIX THIS PLEASE🙏
i can't join public

I like game

I love the game I have played since the superhero update to now but I can’t get into the Halloween update. I know you guys are trying to get that fixed so until then but FIVE
 STARS GREAT GAME BRAVO
The devs and mods are super nice so I recommend good game
Every time I try to load in it crashes.

Im glad the game is back. Though i lost all my cosmetics from October 2023 or 2024 to today. Idk if part of my data was erased from the new update. The good thing is that i kept my currency. Is this a bug or glitch in the new update? Im still happy the game is back, i think its gonna take a bit for the game to regain players. Nice game👍

reviews.review_title: The game is great but has a problem
reviews.review_description: The problem is the wardrobe, when you bought a lot of cosmetics and you want to equip an old cosmetic then you can’t. Because there is not a way to scroll up or down so please fix the wardrobe! 🙏

developer_response.body: There is! If you hover over the wardrobe with your right hand and hold trigger (Make sure fingers are pointed towards the wardrobe, then you can scroll by moving or angling your hand up and down. We are currently working on a new wardrobe system that gets by this error. Sorry for the inconvenience, we are working on making this game better for all!

must play game its got everything from intensive gamemodes to nice calm and vibrant maps!

it fits your every gorilla tag fangame needs and has everything possible u could think of!

go play its very good 100/10!
The game is fun but for some reason I can't get in. Pls fix

reviews.review_title: i meant the other he was so nice to me
reviews.review_description: he told me about this game and then he told me to download it and i loved it.

Although the game doesn’t have many players playing anymore, it’s still a fun game to play, either when your banned on Gorilla Tag or if you just want to play with your friends and have a fun time messing around. However, the downside is that there hasn’t been any recent updates to the game, please work on updates. Also I’ve been her since the Halloween update, with the can’t bucket and stuff. Very great game

reviews.review_title: Whenever I crash into the pirate ship
reviews.review_description: So I tried the game and I was crashing into the pirate ship always and I was on the jet ski and whenever I crash into it and try to swim it will always sink me to the bottom and I can't swim one star
I went on monk and there was an update, and there was a new beach map, but when I went in the map I was lagging 24/7. And it’s so boring🥱.Do not download

Awesome! I love this so much. Most of the time, you will have a lot of fun, and you have so much to see and do! Fan art? the fan art is amazing. Graphics are gorgeous, and the game is very well made! lots of game modes, maps, cosmetics, and they are up-to-date with the updates! Such a great game. For the people reading this, give it a try! I promise you will love it! -Blacklight VR
This game is similar to gorilla tag but that makes it unique but a little bit is different so it's pretty good and you should think it's good too this is Mr nugget and favorite Monk.

The game is great except for one thing, I factory reset my headset and then reinstalled the game, I noticed I had all my cosmetics, but I just couldn't take them off. They weren't on the screen for changing cosmetics for some reason, so now I'm stuck with this fit forever. PLEASE FIX THIS!

When I got in it’s was way way too bright, the graphics are way better than the design of the game they are not even. Water is a pain to be in, the trees are slippery after a while of climbing up, THE MOVEMENT IS VERY MESSED UP ALSO THE MAP IS GLITCHED, also the ropes don’t work half of the time, Please save your eyes it gave me a headache for 2:30 minutes.

reviews.review_title: Full of racist kids yelling the N word
reviews.review_description: This is a disgusting and toxic place. Kids screaming the N word and laughing. Clearly no moderating happening.

So me and my friend saw a YouTuber play this so we decided to play it and then when I join it was FIRE And AMAZING someone showed me how to get cosmetic and there is a sword I used it and it LOOKS SO COOL this game is the best gorilla tag fan game I know but can you add like a new map with like rain and also with slides and water and there is like a plane at the top and you have to do parkour to it to go on the plane but anyways this game is amazing
